user.title: Volkswagen EU Data Act
user.description: Log in with your Volkswagen ID. Before adding, enable a continuous 15-minute data request for your vehicle at https://eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com (Data clusters → Vehicle overview → Get customised data → All data, frequency 15 minutes).

otp.title: Two-factor code
otp.description: Volkswagen emailed a verification code (required for the optional volkswagen.de data source: odometer, service status). Enter it here, or leave the integration with EU Data Act data only by cancelling.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the EU Data Act portal.
error.invalid_otp: That verification code was not accepted. Check the latest email and try again.
